mechanism: Assets that covary more strongly with the crypto market during market declines than during market advances expose holders to bad systematic risk. The frozen direction requires compensation for that exposure: long the highest downside-minus-upside beta asymmetry and short the lowest.
payer: Investors seeking protection from broad crypto drawdowns and participants forced to reduce high co-crash exposure during deleveraging episodes.

data.source: existing local closed OKX perpetual 15-minute history strictly resampled to closed 1-hour bars
data.universe: 18 mature USDT perpetual swaps with complete funding-history eligibility

frozen_rule.market_proxy: equal-weight hourly log return of the 18-symbol universe
frozen_rule.characteristic: downside beta conditional on negative market hours minus upside beta conditional on positive market hours
frozen_rule.weighting: equal 50 percent long and 50 percent short

anti_rescue: do not reverse the direction after seeing results
do not replace the equal-weight market proxy after seeing results
do not exclude BTC or any other eligible symbol
do not change the 42-day lookback or weekly schedule after seeing results
do not add momentum, volatility, liquidity, funding or sector filters
do not open future returns or PnL unless every pre-PnL gate passes
